text.title: Ops Automation Workflow Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: ≥10 hours/week of repetitive tasks AND tool surface available AND founder authority?

branch.when: repetitive_hours_per_week >= 10 AND tool_surface_present == true AND founder_authority == true
